name: engineering-standards
description: John's standard engineering regime as a reusable, stack-agnostic starting point for any serious project.

interface.shortDescription: A strict, portfolio-grade engineering regime for any project.
interface.longDescription: Use Engineering Standards when Codex needs reusable project guardrails or a scaffold for serious software work. The bundled skills encode John's stack-agnostic regime: functional-core/imperative-shell design, semantic types, railway-oriented errors, BDD and mutation testing, strict linting, ADRs, eval-driven context discipline, and repository-local delivery.
defaultPrompt: Apply the engineering standards to this repository.
Scaffold this project so it enforces John's engineering standards.
